name: Fire Bee
description:
Fire Bee is a Vladof legendary grenade mod from the Borderlands 2 base game.

It excels at softening up or clearing groups of unarmoured enemies, combining a flaming ground ring with extra incendiary projectiles that fan out from the blast.
notes:
Fire Bee uses a fixed incendiary accessory and the Exterminator area effect payload. Storm Front and Pandemic share the same payload, but their behaviour differs due to separate balance settings.

Unlike the other two, Fire Bee has no dedicated drop source.

special.description:
Always incendiary. On detonation it creates a rotating ring of fire and launches multiple small fire missiles outward; the missiles explode on contact.

Bees are coming!
special.title: Bees are coming!
